sn22.108:1.1:
1
Sāvatthinidānaṁ. "Pañcime, bhikkhave, upādānakkhandhā. Katame pañca? Seyyathidaṁ – rūpupādānakkhandho, vedanupādānakkhandho, saññupādānakkhandho, saṅkhārupādānakkhandho, viññāṇupādānakkhandho.
sn22.108:1.2: Ye hi keci, bhikkhave, samaṇā vā brāhmaṇā vā imesaṁ pañcannaṁ upādānakkhandhānaṁ samudayañca atthaṅgamañca assādañca ādīnavañca nissaraṇañca yathābhūtaṁ nappajānanti … pe … pajānanti, sayaṁ abhiññā sacchikatvā upasampajja vihārantī"ti.
